query:
UPDATE leave_balances lb
                SET entitled_days = GREATEST(lb.entitled_days - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW()
                FROM leave_types lt
                WHERE lb.leave_type_id = lt.id
                  AND lb.employee_id = $1
                  AND lb.year = $2
                  AND lt.company_id = $3
                  AND lt.name = 'Replacement Leave'
